title: Naach Lucky Naach
subTitle: Ten-year-old Lakshmi dreams of winning a national-level dance competition, but she hesitates to participate when her single mother, Nandini, detests music and dance.

title: Lost
subTitle: A journalist relentlessly investigates to uncover the truth behind the sudden and mysterious disappearance of a young activist.

title: Aattral
subTitle: Arjun's father, who is a mechanic, manages to get INR 10 lakh to fulfil Arjun's dream of developing an automatic car. However, the former is robbed and killed by a mysterious man.

title: Crook
subTitle: After his uncle catches him selling pirated DVDs, Jai Dixit is sent to Australia with a new identity. However, whilst falling in love with a woman, he assumes yet another identity to pursue her.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Tumsa Nahin Dekha
subTitle: Daksh, an alcoholic millionaire, falls in love with Jiya, a stripper. However, he must marry Anahita to retain his inheritance.

title: Kesari
subTitle: A Sikh havildar and his soldiers put their lives on the line to protect Saragarhi from the Afghans. The battle goes down in history as a shining example of their valour.

title: Vijay The Master
subTitle: Troubled alcoholic teacher JD goes to work at a juvenile reform school. When he realises a dangerous criminal is using students to cover up his crimes, JD sets out to stop him.

title: Sanam Teri Kasam
subTitle: A librarian, cast out by her family, asks her neighbour to help her find a suitable husband. However, their growing feelings for each other complicate the situation.

title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Skanda: The Attacker
subTitle: After Rayudu and Ranjith Reddy's children elope, the CMs turn against each other. However, when a college student kidnaps Reddy's daughter, a revenge saga unravels.

title: Entertainment
subTitle: Akhil, an underdog and a failure, comes to know that his real father is a rich diamond merchant who has just passed away. When he goes to retrieve his wealth, he learns that a dog has inherited it.

title: Entertainment
subTitle: Akhil, an underdog and a failure, comes to know that his real father is a rich diamond merchant who has just passed away. When he goes to retrieve his wealth, he learns that a dog has inherited it.

title: Woh Lamhe
subTitle: Sana, a schizophrenic actress, and Aditya, a filmmaker, fall for each other but her hallucinations put their relationship at stake.

title: Kalyug
subTitle: Kunal and Renuka's marital bliss is shattered when a group of people film and upload a video of them being intimate on an adult website. Kunal fights to take them and their illegal racket down.

title: Tarla
subTitle: With dreams bigger than every social barrier known to women, Tarla Dalal embarks on an inspirational journey to change the country's culinary landscape.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Snake
subTitle: A young farm girl, ensnared by a sinister stranger's lies, must wield the truth to rescue her family from impending danger.

title: Legend of the Naga Pearls
subTitle: Stripped of their flight after a defeat by Uranopolis's humans, the Winged Tribe seeks retribution. However, a royal heir must locate the Naga Pearls to avenge their loss.

title: Bimbisara
subTitle: Getting betrayed by his brother, ancient evil king Bimbisara teleports to the modern-day world and traps in the mirror. Desperate to return to his empire, Bimbisara searches for the mirror to break free.

title: Sky Force
subTitle: During the 1965 Indo-Pak conflict, India endures a catastrophic unexpected assault. Wing Commander Ahuja directs a counterattack, but Squadron Leader Vijaya disappears following a brave solo confrontation with a more powerful enemy aircraft. Ahuja dedicates 23 years to uncovering the truth, revealing a conspiracy, and finally achieving posthumous honor for Vijaya's courage and selflessness.

title: Indian
subTitle: Police officer Raj Azad arrests terrorist Wasim Khan and prepares to interrogate him. However, his father-in-law mysteriously dies, after which he is blamed for his death and goes on the run.

title: Badal
subTitle: Badal's family dies at the hands of a corrupt police officer. While he is raised by his father's friend, he turns into a terrorist and vows to avenge his family's death.

title: Coolie No. 1
subTitle: A matchmaker gets insulted by a rich and arrogant businessman. Later, he decides to take a revenge against the businessman by making his daughter fall in love with a porter.

title: Bhakshak
subTitle: A struggling local journalist begins a dogged investigation into harrowing cases of abuse being covered up at a shelter for young girls.

title: Milenge Milenge
subTitle: Priya believes she has met her destined lover when she meets and falls in love with Amit, but they soon part ways due to differences. Fate, however, perpetually conspires to bring them back together.

title: Milenge Milenge
subTitle: Priya believes she has met her destined lover when she meets and falls in love with Amit, but they soon part ways due to differences. Fate, however, perpetually conspires to bring them back together.

title: Blurr
subTitle: Suspicious about the circumstances surrounding her twin sister's death, a woman with progressive blindness searches for answers that eventually lead her down a dangerous path.

title: Salaam Venky
subTitle: Sujata, an ideal mother, faces the biggest challenge of her life when her son is diagnosed with muscular dystrophy. Despite this, she is determined to help her child live life to the fullest.

title: Attack
subTitle: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and traumatised with thoughts of his dead lover. When the attacker returns, Arjun puts his life on the line to serve his nation and seek revenge.

title: Time Story
subTitle: Sethuraman, a scientist, invents a time-travelling gadget that his evil twin Athreya wants to get hold of. Soon, a bitter battle arises between Sethuraman's son and Athreya.

title: Raksha Bandhan
subTitle: Embracing his role as the provider, Lala Kedarnath puts personal romantic interests on the back burner until his quirky sisters can be married off into loving families.

title: Indian
subTitle: Police officer Raj Azad arrests terrorist Wasim Khan and prepares to interrogate him. However, his father-in-law mysteriously dies, after which he is blamed for his death and goes on the run.

title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
subTitle: Bhaijaan, the eldest of three siblings, refuses to get married to maintain harmony in his family. However, complications arise after his brothers conspire for him to fall in love.

title: Spyder
subTitle: Shiva, an intelligence officer, develops a phone software that helps him track those in need of help. He sets out to save the people of Hyderabad when he realises that a serial killer is on the loose.

title: Deva
subTitle: A police officer investigates the murder of his close friend. However, he suffers a traumatic accident that wipes away his memory, jeopardising the investigation.
